name: nyc-budget-mcp
description: PROTOTYPE (local-only, unpublished) MCP server for BetaNYC's New York City Budget data — Council discretionary funding (Schedule C), Terms & Conditions, Section 254 capital changes, FY2026 Transparency Resolutions, and the FY2008–FY2027 Legistar crosswalk.
author: BetaNYC

scripts.prepare: npm run build && npm run build-index
scripts.pretest: npm run build && npm run build-index
